changes: Expeditions: auto-send mercenary now works across every market you enable, not just the home market. Each market has its own on/off toggle, and the cheapest available mercenary is launched from its own market.
Expeditions: new "max cost per mercenary" limit for auto-send — mercenaries that cost more than the amount you set are skipped.

Fix: auto-send could occasionally launch a mercenary over your cost limit when a cost-preview response was dropped and prices got mixed up between mercenaries; previews are now matched reliably, so the limit always holds.
